_info: Wonniland learnset database — combines level-up movesets (gen_9.h), teachable TM/Tutor moves (teachable_learnsets.h), and egg moves (egg_moves.h).
_note: Key matches the species name stripped of spaces/symbols (e.g. 'Bulbasaur'). Cross-reference via pokemon.json 'learnset_ref'/'teachable_ref'/'egg_moves_ref' fields, or directly by Pokémon name.
